name: Broccoli Two Cheese Quiche
recipeIngredient: 6 Slices American cheese, broken into pieces
4 Slices Swiss cheese, broken into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the broccoli according to package directions; drain.
2. In a large bowl, beat the eggs and stir in the Bisquick, oil, milk, American cheese, Swiss cheese, Parmesan cheese, and garlic powder until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Pour the mixture into an 8" x 8" greased baking pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes, or until set.
